creator: mik@tagan.ru
text:
When I used port on amd64 system I have stable error:
op: user postgres FAILED to execute

When I copy to this amd64 system binary "op" from i386 system all work.
Ports & realse of FreeBSD are same on i386 & amd64 systems.

Binary "op" compiled on i386 sometimes exited on signal 11 or 10 on amd64 system.
